form.formComment: Most recently raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 3 len at this track Bm75 March 31 over 1200m defeating Sand 'N' Power with 54.5kg at $2.80. The start before that raced on the pace when 3rd of 9 at this track Hcp on March 15 over 1000m, on a wet track; 1.2 len behind Roweiner's Dance carrying 54kg at $7. Going well but this will test.

form.formComment: Last start led to the turn then faded 6th of 10 at this track Bm75 on March 31 over 1200m, 5 len behind Russian Mint carrying 57.5kg at $26. form.formComment: Third-up today and has won third-up in the past. First-up came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track Bm72 on February 27 over 1000m, slow going 0.6 len behind Cole's Best with 57.5kg at $10. Last start 5th of 10 at this track Bm75 on March 31 over 1200m, 4 len behind Russian Mint with 57kg at $2.10. Racing well. Sure to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign second of 7 at Ewan Bm70 September 26 over 1750m, 3.5 len behind Medal with 58.5kg at $5.50. First up last campaign second of 8 at Hughenden Bm60 May 17 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Pennypacker carrying 62.5kg at $3. Expecting a bright return.

form.formComment: Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.25 len at this track Bm65 March 31 over 1400m defeating Keep On Running carrying 58.5kg at $3.40. The run before that 2nd of 9 at Cairns Bm65 on March 12 over 1250m, on heavy track; 1.4 len behind Desert Grit carrying 58.5kg at $2.10. Boasts a 100% record at this track so he is expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at Mackay Bm62 November 11 over 2000m, 14 len behind The Penske File carrying 61.5kg at $4.80. First up last campaign tenth of 13 at Sale Bm64 July 6 over 1600m, in the wet; 10 len behind Makdane carrying 59kg at $51. Has some claims if presented on song.
